assessments.title: Week 1 Assessment: Python Foundations

questions.q: What is the output of print(type([1,2,3]))?
Which keyword is used to define a function?
What does range(5) produce?
Write a function that returns the sum of a list of numbers.
Write a loop that prints even numbers from 0 to 10.

assessments.aiAnalysisPrompt: Analyze the learner's responses. Identify strengths and gaps. Suggest 2-3 focused review blocks.

assessments.title: Week 2 Assessment: NumPy

questions.q: What is broadcasting in NumPy?
np.array([1,2,3]).shape returns?
Create a 3x3 identity matrix using NumPy.
Compute mean and std of array [1,2,3,4,5].
Which is faster: NumPy vectorized op or Python loop?

assessments.aiAnalysisPrompt: Analyze NumPy comprehension. Suggest practice on broadcasting or indexing if weak.

assessments.title: Week 3 Assessment: Pandas

questions.q: What is a pandas Series?
Given df, how do you select column 'age'?
Group df by 'category' and get mean of 'value'.
merge() in pandas performs?
Drop rows with NaN in column 'x'.

assessments.aiAnalysisPrompt: Assess Pandas fluency. Recommend groupby/merge practice if needed.

assessments.title: Week 4 Assessment: Visualization

questions.q: Which library provides high-level statistical plots?
Create a simple line plot of [1,2,3,4,5] vs [10,15,13,17,20].
questions.solution: import matplotlib.pyplot as plt; plt.plot([1,2,3,4,5],[10,15,13,17,20]); plt.show()

assessments.aiAnalysisPrompt: Assess visualization understanding. Suggest Matplotlib/Seaborn practice if needed.

assessments.title: Week 5 Assessment: File Formats

questions.q: Which module is used for JSON in Python?
Read a CSV file 'data.csv' into a pandas DataFrame.
questions.solution: import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv('data.csv')

assessments.aiAnalysisPrompt: Assess file I/O and data loading skills.

assessments.title: Week 6 Assessment: APIs & Scraping

questions.q: What does requests.get() return?
BeautifulSoup is used for?

assessments.aiAnalysisPrompt: Assess HTTP and web scraping understanding.

questions.q: FastAPI uses which validation library?

p-value < 0.05 typically means?
spaCy provides?
OpenCV is used for?
SQLAlchemy is a?
pytest discovers tests by?
